title: Here's Why You Should Stay Invested in Nasdaq (NDAQ) Stock Now
text: Improving organic growth, focus on ramping up the on-trading revenue base, buyouts to capitalize on growing market opportunities and effective capital deployment poise Nasdaq (NDAQ) for growth.

title: DBOEY vs. NDAQ: Which Stock Should Value Investors Buy Now?
text: Investors with an interest in Securities and Exchanges stocks have likely encountered both Deutsche Boerse AG (DBOEY) and Nasdaq (NDAQ). But which of these two stocks offers value investors a better bang for their buck right now?

title: 3 Prime-Catch Value Stocks to Snag on Nasdaq's Slide
text: It's no secret the stock market is becoming more volatile. Although most major stock indices are up by double-digit percentages in 2023, we're seeing wilder price swings on almost a daily basis.

title: Cannabis Stocks Are Red-Hot Right Now and This Could Send Them Even Higher
text: Shares of Canopy Growth and Aurora Cannabis have more than doubled in just a few weeks. The U.S. government potentially rescheduling marijuana has gotten investors extremely bullish on pot stocks.

title: 5 NYSE-Listed Emerging Market Stocks For Income Investors
text: Emerging markets have much to offer investors in 2023 and 2024, including globe-leading growth. The emerging markets are expected to more than double their developed counterparts in 2024, and many pay dividends along with the diversification.

title: Sampo has applied for Mandatum to be listed on Nasdaq Helsinki
text: Sampo plc     Stock exchange release      15 September 2023 at 6:00 pm  Sampo has applied for Mandatum to be listed on Nasdaq Helsinki NOT FOR PUBLICATION, DISTRIBUTION OR RELEASE, IN WHOLE OR IN PART, DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, IN OR INTO AUSTRALIA, CANADA, HONG KONG, JAPAN, NEW ZEALAND, SOUTH AFRICA OR SINGAPORE OR ANY OTHER JURISDICTION IN WHICH PUBLICATION OR DISTRIBUTION WOULD BE UNLAWFUL. Sampo has today applied for the shares in Mandatum plc to be admitted to trading on the official list of Nasdaq Helsinki Ltd.

title: Nasdaq Study Shows Legacy Technology and Regulation Preventing Financial Institutions From Capturing Growth Opportunities
text: 78% of FMI investment budgets dominated by maintaining and upgrading legacy technology, with more than a third planning a major system overhaul in the next five years

title: Market Crosswinds And Nasdaq Looking Better Than Dow
text: Major indexes below 50-day moving averages, regional and money center banks looking bearish, 10-year rate and oil prices at highs. Economic numbers show a soft landing, but negative numbers from China and Germany raise concerns.

title: It's Not Just BlackRock. Exchanges Like Nasdaq Are Pushing into Crypto, Too.
text: Traditional exchanges have opportunities in crypto beyond listing Bitcoin ETFs, including selling market data and tokenizing other assets.

title: Delisting of Securities of Nymox Pharmaceutical Corporation; Aridis Pharmaceuticals Inc.; Novan, Inc.; ViewRay, Inc.; 9 Meters Biopharma, Inc.; Nabriva Therapeutics plc; UTA Acquisition Corporation; AppHarvest, Inc.; Yellow Corporation; Proterra Inc.; Amyris, Inc.; Chain Bridge I; LatAmGrowth SPAC; and SpringBig Holdings, Inc. from The Nasdaq Stock Market
text: NEW YORK, Sept. 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Nasdaq Stock Market announced today that it will delist the common stock of Nymox Pharmaceutical Corporation. Nymox Pharmaceutical Corporation's securities were suspended on July 7, 2023, and have not traded on Nasdaq since that time.

title: SEC set to approve proposal to shift audit funding costs to brokers, investors
text: The Securities and Exchange Commission was on track Wednesday to approve a new proposal for funding the Consolidated Audit Trail, a database that tracks all trades, orders and quotes in the U.S. equity market.
